description_long: This house features a modern, multi-volume design with a combination of flat and hipped roofs. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a wooden door, flanked by large windows and a two-car garage. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige color, contrasted by dark gray roofing and window frames. The rear of the house showcases expansive floor-to-ceiling windows, suggesting an open-plan living area with ample natural light. Smaller windows are distributed asymmetrically on the sides and back, providing privacy while maintaining illumination. The driveway and walkway are composed of rectangular concrete slabs leading up to the main entrance.
description: A modern, multi-volume house with a mix of flat and hipped roofs, large windows, and a prominent entryway with a garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, two-car garage, and walkway leading to the door.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting large floor-to-ceiling windows and the flat-roofed section.
description_view_2: Back view with minimal windows and a clear view of the hipped roof structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows and the driveway extending to the side.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wooden door, concrete steps, and a small overhang, flanked by large windows and adjacent to a garage.
